guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 30. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_h: Point to the big H and say: hhhhhh. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_l: Now point to the big L and say: llllll.

parent_story: Harry the horse looked at a green leaf. Harry ran to the green leaf.
